    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.3.5",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.3.5",
    "body": "### Fixed\n- **Speaker diarization failed on PyTorch ≥ 2.6** (`Weights only load failed …\n  Unsupported global: torch.torch_version.TorchVersion`) even with the pyannote\n  license accepted. PyTorch 2.6 made `torch.load` default to\n  `weights_only=True`, whose secure unpickler rejects the pyannote checkpoint's\n  metadata globals. The diarization loader now registers the same safe-globals\n  allowlist the WhisperX VAD load already uses, so the secure load succeeds.\n  (#270)\n### Linux x64 artifacts\n\n```\n64e81fa1f8900c883dfa8ce700abe6f7a9de41e26013e5f5e06d8014bbbe2fc4  OmniVoice Studio_0.3.5_amd64.AppImage\n00cf608105b0c4fb25122f60bdcf39382c7b6459305ce91b74bc0d1b30bb673d  OmniVoice Studio_0.3.5_amd64.AppImage.sig\n```\n\n\n### Windows x64 artifacts\n\n```\n39529182a1c61a561fffc82c82c5886b8e4c640bf153c6134d9570099192e906 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.5_x64_en-US.msi\n462243782917d945ddd2c9b463da3e7a094e18205a36bdd3be02d92d6b4c893c *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.5_x64_en-US.msi.sig\n```\n\n",

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.3.4",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.3.4",
    "body": "### Fixed\n- **Transcription on Windows + NVIDIA failed with `Could not locate\n  cudnn_ops_infer64_8.dll`.** WhisperX/faster-whisper need cuDNN 8 (via\n  CTranslate2); when the side-loaded `cudnn8_compat` libs are missing, the\n  **PyTorch Whisper** backend (Settings → Models) now works as a drop-in\n  fallback — it builds its own transformers pipeline on PyTorch's cuDNN-9\n  stack, with no CTranslate2/cuDNN-8 dependency and no\n  `OMNIVOICE_PRELOAD_TTS_ASR=1` required. (#255)\n### Linux x64 artifacts\n\n```\nf339dc9f9965e68657a52f03ab482634c0a1ccdf74b23851b4ba6c03c8410088  OmniVoice Studio_0.3.4_amd64.AppImage\n583ce6d798be5f811cc98c3ba765e484787f35055da692ae57cb6223e66db0dd  OmniVoice Studio_0.3.4_amd64.AppImage.sig\n```\n\n\n### Windows x64 artifacts\n\n```\nc19a106a0d793e1a4612663f28cfcb705721a0171da43b2eb69354c9572c4956 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.4_x64_en-US.msi\nd03fdf58f810fdfcb4750e6c5e5122119e63dc649791d06313829e2f5932b936 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.4_x64_en-US.msi.sig\n```\n\n",

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.3.3",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.3.3",
    "body": "### Fixed\n- **Settings → About showed the wrong architecture in the Docker/web build.**\n  The \"Architecture\" row rendered the *client browser's* platform\n  (`navigator.platform` → e.g. \"Win32\"); it now reports the **server's** CPU\n  architecture from the backend (`platform.machine()`), correct for both the\n  desktop app and Docker. The blank version/GPU/RAM/VRAM in the same report\n  were the loopback-gate 403s already fixed in v0.3.2. (#262)\n\n### CI\n- The release SHA-256 checksum step no longer uses `mapfile` (a bash 4+\n  builtin) — it broke on the macOS runner's bash 3.2 and dropped the macOS\n  `SHA256SUMS` for v0.3.1/v0.3.2. Now portable to bash 3.2.\n### Linux x64 artifacts\n\n```\n733727fe9616ddbe5f2f03d50cfbe36ec928b37de655b44d8410499f390e29d7  OmniVoice Studio_0.3.3_amd64.AppImage\n59396552c46986491886a50cb139dd9defc386af377f0b01891bc04f365f9d28  OmniVoice Studio_0.3.3_amd64.AppImage.sig\n```\n\n\n### Windows x64 artifacts\n\n```\nb389a9a53975b7b67e6eeea85b30baaf7eb150d40c08bc98a34469ce45175ebd *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.3_x64_en-US.msi\na1b11b1cb128505386d9e94d9277236d55e9e1431f30cea7cb56b838ea6bfd28 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.3_x64_en-US.msi.sig\n```\n\n",

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.3.2",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.3.2",
    "body": "### Fixed\n- **\"Loopback origin required\" all over the Docker UI** (and a blank version).\n  The `/system/*` and `/api/settings/*` routes are restricted to a loopback\n  origin, but Docker's NAT makes every request look non-loopback, so the gate\n  403'd the operator out of the admin UI — including `/system/info` (blanking\n  the version) and HF-token entry. The Docker image now runs with\n  `OMNIVOICE_SERVER_MODE=1`, which relaxes the gate for the headless\n  deployment; exposure is governed by the `-p` port mapping plus the optional\n  share PIN. Desktop builds are unaffected — their loopback boundary (and the\n  denial of admin routes to LAN share guests) is unchanged. (#261)\n### Windows x64 artifacts\n\n```\na2c7834d5c46efdc0bbada5de5a13f09d8085cc710074e7c5a0a1775a43a3902 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.2_x64_en-US.msi\n8c2e76c0f5357e3c7d340ef46898178d10352fe19607285dcdfef7ade0f7c4c6 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.2_x64_en-US.msi.sig\n```\n\n"
  },

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.3.1",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.3.1",
    "body": "First tagged build of the 0.3 line off `main` — it ships the accumulated\n`[0.3.0]` work below plus the fixes here. (The `[0.3.0]` milestone heading is\nkept for the qualitative \"actually useful\" release.)\n\n### Fixed\n- **Voice-clone / export download crashed in the Docker & browser build** with\n  `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'invoke')`. The\n  export button called the Tauri save dialog unconditionally; outside the\n  desktop shell it now falls back to a standard browser download of the file\n  served at `/audio/<path>`. (#256)\n- **Docker container showed no version** (a dash) in Settings → About, and the\n  desktop-only update-channel toggle appeared in the web build. The running\n  version is now read from the backend (`/system/info` `app_version`, `/health`\n  `version`); the updater UI is hidden outside Tauri. Also corrected the\n  version-check command in the Docker docs (`omnivoice`, not\n  `omnivoice-studio`). (#249)\n- **Transcription failures were masked** by a generic \"Transcribe stream\n  dropped\" message. The transcribe SSE stream now surfaces the real, sanitized\n  cause (with an actionable hint) instead of silently dropping when model load\n  or VRAM offload fails. (#255)\n### Windows x64 artifacts\n\n```\n1f7fb7064f5813330705baa6e0b7fb110fb8257838594e81d51c7935f13ec959 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.1_x64_en-US.msi\n1aa38c6bd0147fadba3a1c083a581ced07ad857eef30ced1e262061c9cf8351a *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.1_x64_en-US.msi.sig\n```\n\n",

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.3.0",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.3.0",
    "body": "### Added\n- **Frameless dictation widget.** Global dictation upgraded from an in-app FAB to a true OS-level floating widget that hovers over any application. Transparent, decorations-free, always-on-top secondary Tauri window activated by `⌘+⇧+Space`. Auto-hides 2.5 s after a successful paste.\n- **Standalone `CaptureWidget` component.** Refactored `CaptureButton` into `CaptureWidget`, running on an isolated route (`/?window=widget`).\n- **Social preview image.** Added `social-preview.png` for GitHub SEO.\n\n### Changed\n- **README overhaul.** Compact 3-column feature grid, reorganized Quickstart (one-command install, Docker, Desktop App tips), updated comparison table, roadmap, and footer CTA.\n- **Docker Compose profiles are mutually exclusive.** CPU service now requires `--profile cpu` (was the implicit default). Prevents port 3900 conflict when running `--profile gpu`. Usage: `docker compose --profile cpu up` or `docker compose --profile gpu up`.\n\n### Fixed\n- **Docker GPU detection false negative.** Preflight reported \"No compatible GPU detected\" inside Docker containers because `nvidia-smi` isn't present in the PyTorch base image. The GPU probe now falls back to `torch.cuda.is_available()` and `torch.cuda.get_device_name()`, correctly showing CUDA as available in containerized deployments.\n\n---\n### Windows x64 artifacts\n\n```\n9e3b598726efb19c3382d6ec6f7faf3b31beb0ca09bd451e3b60b3fef10b38ea *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.0_x64_en-US.msi\n62268e015315c6bd362faad37537f38325f0d8f571b64713c9e94eeeefc45949 *OmniVoice Studio_0.3.0_x64_en-US.msi.sig\n```\n\n",

    "body": "> 🧪 **Rolling preview build from `main`** — newest features, less tested. Opt in via **Settings → About → Update channel → Preview**; switch back to Stable any time.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* feat: Scalar API docs, community health files, Quickstart cards by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/41\r\n* fix: resolve open issues — Discord link, Docker crash, IndexTTS compat, engine tooltips by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/47\r\n* Stability pass: DB leaks, App.jsx hooks refactor, desktop bootstrap by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/49\r\n* Post-refactor cleanup: wire fingerprints, drop dead code, scope pytest by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/50\r\n* Import .srt subtitles to bypass Whisper (closes #52) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/53\r\n* fix: lazy-load ASR during desktop startup by @sunsetsobserver in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/61\r\n* fix: setuptools pin, Linux/Russia troubleshooting (#58, #56, #60) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/62\r\n* Phase 0 — Gates: cross-platform CI matrix + regression fixture + release smoke by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/71\r\n* security: add loopback origin check to /system/set-env by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/81\r\n* Cross-platform bug bash: docker, diarization, VRAM concurrency, dub editor UX, Stories tab by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/51\r\n* fix(widget): hide dictation pill when idle, show only when activated by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/83\r\n* fix: stabilize dub/diarization UI + production deployment + sonitranslate plumbing by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/75\r\n* fix(docker): GPU detection in containers + compose profiles + sonitranslate cuDNN sub-repo by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/74\r\n* fix: add PYTHONPATH to docker-compose for pre-built images by @fishandsheep in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/77\r\n* P0: release.yml typecheck + bind audit + loopback middleware by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/84\r\n* docs(v0.3.0): research + 18 plans for fat-milestone planning by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/87\r\n* P0 wave-1: security + correctness + Phase 2 foundation by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/88\r\n* Phase 1 Wave 1: HF token persistence + redactor (closes #35) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/91\r\n* docs(planning): Phase 0 VERIFICATION + flip GATE/AUTH status to Done by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/92\r\n* Phase 1 Wave 3: AppImage launcher + .deb ffprobe + Docker LAN + Gatekeeper probe (closes #54, #56, #76, #80) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/93\r\n* fix(smoke): force-override OMNIVOICE_DATA_DIR + purge cached backend modules by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/95\r\n* Phase 1 Wave 2: per-OS install docs + Settings UI + error→docs deeplinks by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/94\r\n* Phase 2 Plan 02-02: audio I/O hardening + WAV-export correctness by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/96\r\n* Phase 2 Plan 02-01: SubprocessBackend primitive (Wave 1 of Phase 2) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/97\r\n* Phase 2 Plan 02-03: IndexTTS on SubprocessBackend (closes #42) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/98\r\n* Phase 2 Plan 02-04: Engine Compatibility Matrix API + UI by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/99\r\n* Phase 3 Plan 03-01: Supertonic-3 engine on SubprocessBackend by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/101\r\n* Fix NameError: '_gpu_pool' is not defined in get_model() by @nexlabz in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/90\r\n* fix(tauri): inject-apprun path relative to frontend/ (where beforeBundleCommand runs) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/102\r\n* fix(desktop-prod): clean backend data dir for actual fresh-install emulation by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/103\r\n* fix(widget): hide on app load, bottom-center position, exclude from window-state restore by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/104\r\n* fix(ui): calmer launchpad — hide readiness when green, drop duplicate notif pill by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/105\r\n* fix(ui): hide RAM/CPU/VRAM in header by default; opt in via Settings → Performance by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/106\r\n* fix(ui): gate A/B Compare on having ≥2 profiles to actually compare by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/107\r\n* fix(ui): move UI scale + theme picker from footer to Settings → Appearance by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/108\r\n* Per-segment audio effects DSP preset selector (closes #67, rebased from #68) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/109\r\n* fix: personality preset crash in Design tab (closes #89) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/111\r\n* fix: speaker detection — gated pyannote license surfaces a docs deeplink (closes #78) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/110\r\n* Phase 4 Plan 04-01: SPIKE-01 GGUF — GO + integration by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/100\r\n* ci(security): scanning workflow + CodeRabbit config + sweep design (PR 0) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/135\r\n* feat: pipeline error transparency — no more silent \"unknown error\" (plan-04, closes #131) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/136\r\n* fix(client): use window.location.hostname for remote/Docker deployments by @abhid in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/123\r\n* fix(windows): HF cache disk-fallback for WinError 448 (plan-01, closes #117 #118) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/137\r\n* feat: bundle Claude Code agent skill at .claude/skills/omnivoice/ by @broomva in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/113\r\n* fix(windows): gate torch.compile on Triton + ASR critical-path smoke (plan-02, closes #65) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/138\r\n* fix(bootstrap): mirror cascade + system-Python fallback for blocked networks (plan-03, closes #60) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/140\r\n* fix(voice-design): validator-safe instruct builder (plan-05, closes #114 #115) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/141\r\n* fix(bootstrap): always try only-system fallback (drop too-strict gate, refs #130) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/142\r\n* feat(macos): wire Developer-ID signing + notarization; fix \"app is damaged\" docs (#134, #72) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/143\r\n* chore: set version to 0.3.0 across all sources (+ drop v0.4 references) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/145\r\n* ci: gate omnivoice-tts build to pin changes; drop hanging Intel-Mac leg by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/147\r\n* fix(bootstrap): surface why the backend \"never started\" (refs #144, #127) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/148\r\n* feat(settings): configurable models directory (#64) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/149\r\n* feat: onboarding demos, opt-in bug reporting, error-docs deeplinks + issue triage by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/133\r\n* feat(dub): audio-only dubbing mode (#119) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/150\r\n* docs(#124): AMD GPU (ROCm) install path by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/151\r\n* fix(dub): async-ify _pitch_preserving_stretch (Greptile P1 from #133) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/152\r\n* fix(onboarding): hide DictationDemo when sample assets are absent by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/153\r\n* feat(bootstrap): opt-in AMD ROCm torch install (#124) [needs AMD-hardware validation] by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/154\r\n* docs(install): clarify macOS Gatekeeper \"damaged\" workaround (#134) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/155\r\n* fix(windows): port-conflict kill + Triton/torch.compile disable (salvaged from #85) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/156\r\n* l10n(zh-CN): full Chinese localization + Windows/settings fixes (absorbed from #66) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/157\r\n* fix(bootstrap): scrub PYTHONHOME/PYTHONPATH before uv so AppImage venv build succeeds (#144, #127) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/158\r\n* feat: network sharing (PIN-gated LAN + QR) & Tailscale remote access (#125) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/159\r\n* polish(network): outermost PIN gate + non-buffering ASGI middleware + listener test by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/160\r\n* fix(tailscale): HTTP serve fallback when tailnet lacks HTTPS certs + parallel dev launch by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/161\r\n* test: scrub brand name from whisper segmentation fixture by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/162\r\n* feat(network): user-configurable backend / LAN-share / UI ports by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/163\r\n* fix(scripts): support Windows (Git Bash) in desktop-prod.sh (#164) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/165\r\n* fix(scripts): Windows (Git Bash) support in install/run/smoke-test by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/166\r\n* fix(diarization): use_auth_token->token shim for pyannote on HF Hub 1.x (#167) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/168\r\n* fix(network): footer Local toggle was dead in Tauri (window.confirm no-op) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/169\r\n* feat(settings): dedicated Appearance tab + global font selection by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/170\r\n* fix(network): remote LAN-share UI actually works (same-origin API + safe clipboard) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/171\r\n* chore: gitignore Spec Kit/GSD local tooling (clean untracked clutter) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/172\r\n* fix(model): first-run model load/download never hangs forever (Windows demo-voice hang) by @debpalash in https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/pull/173\r\n* fix(docker): runtime API-base override (Settings 'Failed to load engines: Failed to fetch') by @debpalash in     "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.2.7",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.2.7",
    "body": "### Added\r\n- **Frameless dictation widget.** Global dictation upgraded from an in-app FAB to a true OS-level floating widget that hovers over any application. Transparent, decorations-free, always-on-top secondary Tauri window activated by `⌘+⇧+Space`. Auto-hides 2.5 s after a successful paste.\r\n- **Standalone `CaptureWidget` component.** Refactored `CaptureButton` into `CaptureWidget`, running on an isolated route (`/?window=widget`).\r\n- **Social preview image.** Added `social-preview.png` for GitHub SEO.\r\n\r\n### Changed\r\n- **README overhaul.** Compact 3-column feature grid, reorganized Quickstart (one-command install, Docker, Desktop App tips), updated comparison table, roadmap, and footer CTA.\r\n\r\n---",

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.2.5",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.2.5",
    "body": "## What's New in v0.2.5\r\n\r\n### 🎙️ System-Wide Dictation\r\n- **Global hotkey** — Press `⌘+⇧+Space` from **any app** to start dictating\r\n- **Auto-paste** — Transcribed text is automatically pasted into the active text field\r\n- **Live partial results** — See what you're saying in real-time via WebSocket streaming ASR\r\n\r\n### 🎬 Batch Video Dubbing Pipeline\r\n- **Full autonomous pipeline** — Drop videos, pick languages, hit go:\r\n  `extract → transcribe → translate → generate → mix → export`\r\n- **Live progress tracking** — Stage, percentage, current language, segment count\r\n- **Batch Queue UI** — Redesigned with progress bars, cancel/delete buttons, download links\r\n- **Multi-language** — Dub to multiple languages in one pass per video\r\n\r\n### 🧪 Tests\r\n- **23 backend tests** — Batch API endpoints + streaming ASR helpers\r\n- **0.3s execution** — Lightweight fixtures, no GPU required\r\n\r\n### 🛠️ Under the Hood\r\n- Dual-mode ASR (Turbo MLX + WhisperX Accurate)\r\n- Enhanced download progress (speed, ETA, bytes remaining)\r\n- Status bar black flash fix\r\n- Cold-start model preloading\r\n- Full accessibility audit (ARIA labels, focus-visible)\r\n- Compact UI layout improvements\r\n\r\n### Verification\r\n| Check | Result |\r\n|-------|--------|\r\n| Backend tests | ✅ 23/23 passed |\r\n| TypeScript | ✅ Clean |\r\n| Vite build | ✅ 1.5s |\r\n| Rust | ✅ Compiled |\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n> [!NOTE]\r\n> Desktop installers will be attached once CI builds complete.\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/compare/v0.2.4...v0.2.5",

    "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/tarball/v0.2.4",
    "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/zipball/v0.2.4",
    "body": "# OmniVoice Studio v0.2.4\n\nReal-time event architecture, cross-platform desktop hardening.\n\n---\n\n### What's New\n\n**WebSocket Event Bus** — The sidebar now updates instantly when data changes. Projects, profiles, and history reflect backend mutations in real time with zero polling overhead. Graceful reconnect with exponential backoff.\n\n**Default UI Scale → M** — Ships at 1.3× zoom for better readability out of the box.\n\n---\n\n### Fixed\n\n- Windows/Linux MSI: first launch crashed with `Missing bootstrap resources` — Tauri's `_up_` path rewriting wasn't handled ([#28](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/issues/28))\n- Windows: backend logs silently lost — log directory pointed to a macOS-only path ([#30](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/issues/30))\n- Windows: PyTorch hung downloading Triton — now auto-sets `TORCHDYNAMO_DISABLE=1` ([#26](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/issues/26))\n- Windows: startup timeout too aggressive — increased from 3 min → 5 min for first-run CUDA JIT\n- Sidebar: data failed to load on startup due to undefined status function\n- Network: reduced idle polling by ~80% (model status 5s→10s, log polling disabled)\n\n---\n\n### Downloads\n\n| | Installer | Size |\n|---|---|---|\n| 🍎 macOS (Apple Silicon) | [`OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_aarch64.dmg`](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/releases/download/v0.2.4/OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_aarch64.dmg) | ~8 MB |\n| 🪟 Windows x64 | [`OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_x64_en-US.msi`](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/releases/download/v0.2.4/OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_x64_en-US.msi) | ~6 MB |\n| 🐧 Linux x64 (.deb) | [`OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_amd64.deb`](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/releases/download/v0.2.4/OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_amd64.deb) | ~8 MB |\n| 🐧 Linux x64 (AppImage) | [`OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_amd64.AppImage`](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/releases/download/v0.2.4/OmniVoice.Studio_0.2.4_amd64.AppImage) | ~81 MB |\n\n> The installers are lightweight shells (~6–8 MB). On first launch, the app bootstraps a Python environment and downloads model weights (~2.4 GB). This takes 5–10 minutes — the splash screen shows progress.\n\n---\n\n### Post-Install Notes\n\n<details>\n<summary><b>macOS — \"app is damaged and can't be opened\"</b></summary>\n\nmacOS quarantines apps downloaded outside the App Store. After dragging to `/Applications`:\n\n```bash\nxattr -cr /Applications/OmniVoice\\ Studio.app\n```\n\nOpen normally after. One-time fix.\n</details>\n\n<details>\n<summary><b>Windows — Triton / torch.compile warnings</b></summary>\n\nPyTorch may log Triton-related warnings on Windows. These are harmless — `TORCHDYNAMO_DISABLE=1` is now set automatically by the desktop app. If running from source, set it manually:\n\n```\nset TORCHDYNAMO_DISABLE=1\n```\n</details>\n\n<details>\n<summary><b>Linux — AppImage needs FUSE</b></summary>\n\nIf FUSE isn't available, use the `.deb` or extract-and-run:\n\n```bash\nchmod +x OmniVoice.Studio_*.AppImage\n./OmniVoice.Studio_*.AppImage --appimage-extract-and-run\n```\n</details>\n\n---\n\n**Full changelog:** [`v0.2.2...v0.2.4`](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio/compare/v0.2.2...v0.2.4)",
